subcodes.first_line: O leaf of the Tree of Paradise! Your eloquent verses and fluent poetry have been received in the utmost spirituality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه شجره طوبی منظومه بلیغه و ابیات فصیحه شما رسید و در نهایت روحانیت در
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
